title: Cash deposits below ₹10 lakh can still attract an Income Tax notice. Here's why
summary: The ₹10 lakh threshold under Rule 114E only determines when banks must report cash deposits through the Statement of Financial Transactions (SFT). It does not prevent the Income Tax Department from seeking information about deposits below that limit where required under the Income-tax Act.

title: Section 44ADA: How freelancers and professionals can legally pay tax only on 50% of their total income
summary: Section 44ADA allows eligible professionals to pay tax on 50% of their gross receipts as taxable income, treating the rest as a deemed expense deduction. The scheme applies to specified professionals with receipts up to ₹50 lakh, extendable to ₹75 lakh if cash receipts are within 5%.

title: Over 3 crore ITRs already filed: What happens if you miss 31 July deadline? Tax experts explain
summary: With more than 3 crore Income Tax Returns already filed, taxpayers have a limited time before the 31 July 2026 deadline. Missing it can lead to late-filing fees, interest, refund delays, psychological stress, and loss of tax benefits, making timely filing essential.

title: Nifty Smallcap index saw over 20% intra-year declines in 12 of 20 years: What history reveals about timing the market
summary: Small-cap investing has historically delivered strong return potential but with frequent sharp corrections. Data from Nifty Smallcap 250 TRI show that staying invested through volatility and adopting disciplined approaches, such as SIPs, reduces the impact of market timing on long-term outcomes.

title: Forgot your UAN? Here's how to retrieve it online through the EPFO portal
summary: The Universal Account Number (UAN) is essential for checking your PF balance, filing claims and accessing other EPFO services. Here's how members can recover a forgotten UAN online or through EPFO's offline facilities.

title: EPF vs mutual funds: Why EPFO says your provident fund should remain foundation of retirement planning
summary: EPFO has urged salaried employees not to withdraw EPF savings for mutual funds, highlighting EPF's retirement, pension and insurance benefits. Here's how EPF differs from mutual funds, key features, tax benefits and practical investment takeaways for long-term financial planning.

title: Can an insurer reject your claim over a tax issue? Consumer panel answers
summary: A Rajasthan consumer commission has reportedly ruled that insurers cannot reject an otherwise valid claim merely because of an unrelated tax irregularity. The decision underlines that the reason for claim repudiation must have a direct link with the insured loss.

title: ETF split FAQs: Why fund houses are splitting units and how investors benefit
summary: A split reduces the per-unit price of an ETF and increases the number of units an investor owns, while the total value of the investment remains the same. It is not a taxable event and tax applies only when the investor sells the ETF units.

title: Global diversification matters more than ever, says Marcellus' Saurabh Mukherjea
summary: Marcellus Investment Managers' founder and CIO Saurabh Mukherjea argues that portfolios anchored solely to domestic markets may no longer be enough.

title: CGHS pensioner card goes paperless via Bhavishya Portal, making healthcare access for retirees faster and simpler
summary: The Centre has introduced a paperless CGHS pensioner card application process through the Bhavishya Portal for retiring central government employees. The move enables auto-filled applications, PAN-based verification, online payment and faster access to CGHS healthcare benefits after retirement.

title: Rupee ends nearly flat as central bank intervention blunts oil strain
summary: On Thursday, the Indian rupee hovered close to a two-month low, influenced by potential intervention from the central bank to counteract rising oil prices. summary: Interglobe Aviation Q1 Results: Revenue from operations rose 20% year on year to Rs 24,584 crore.

title: Bonus bonanza! This textile player announced 1:1 bonus issue, dividend just 14 sessions after market debut. Do you own?
summary: Aastha Spintex approved a 1:1 bonus issue and Re 0.10 final dividend for FY26, subject to shareholder approval. The microcap textile firm also cleared plans to expand into grey fabric manufacturing, even as its shares remain below the IPO price after listing.

title: Rekha Jhunjhunwala sells over 7 crore Star Health shares in Q1. Details here

title: D P Abhushan posts 77% rise in Q1 PAT to Rs 64 crore
summary: The company posted a PAT of Rs 36.42 crore in Q1 FY26, D P Abhushan said in a statement. Total income for the quarter rose 58% to Rs 854 crore from Rs 541 crore in the June quarter of the financial year ended March 31, 2026, the company said.

title: Crypto deposits outpace withdrawals by up to 6x in H1; millennials dominate India's investor base: Report
summary: According to WazirX's H1 2026 India Crypto Trends Report, crypto deposits exceeded withdrawals by 2–6 times during the first half of 2026, while withdrawal requests fell nearly 55%, signalling stronger investor conviction and longer holding periods. title: Will robotaxi be the next big trigger for Tesla? Here’s what Elon Musk said
summary: Tesla is accelerating the rollout of its unsupervised robotaxi service in the US, with CEO Elon Musk outlining ambitious expansion plans while stressing safety as the company's top priority. Musk also reiterated that humanoid robot Optimus could become Tesla's biggest product as the EV maker doubles

title: Global Market: CXMT's blockbuster IPO rewards Hefei's decade-long semiconductor investment
summary: China's largest memory chipmaker, ChangXin Memory Technologies (CXMT), is set to debut on the Shanghai Stock Exchange after raising $8.6 billion in Asia's biggest IPO this year, highlighting the success of China's state-backed push to build domestic semiconductor champions and AI infrastructure.

title: PVR Inox Q1 Results: Co swings to black, posts Rs 56 crore profit vs year-ago loss
summary: PVR INOX reported a strong June quarter with a net profit of Rs 56.5 crore. Revenue from operations increased to Rs 1,622.2 crore, showing significant year-on-year growth. title: Radhakishan Damani picks up 2% stake in this NBFC stock, which fell 17% in 2026. Do you own it?
summary: Billionaire Radhakishan Damani and his family have re-entered Sundaram Finance with a 2.37% stake in the June quarter through Bright Star Investments, after previously exiting the holding in FY26, according to the company's latest shareholding pattern.
